story.headline: Soiree
story.details:
DOORS OPEN - 11 PM
LADIES FREE BEFORE 11PM
story.details2:
Step into the elegance of SOIRÉE, 
an evening designed for those who appreciate 
style, music, and unforgettable atmosphere. 
Enjoy a sophisticated blend of 
R&B, Afrobeats, and soulful rhythms 
while surrounded by beautiful people, 
handcrafted cocktails, and an ambiance of luxury.
 From the first toast to the final song, 
SOIRÉE is where the city's most stylish gather
 for a night of elevated experiences and 
timeless memories
